name: Lemon-Lime Refrigerator Sheet Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package lemon instant pudding mix (4 servings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve lime gelatin in 3/4 cup of boiling water. Add 1/2 cup cold water. Set aside at room temperature.
2. Mix and bake cake according to package directions. Bake in a 9x13 pan. Cool cake for 30 minutes.
3. Poke deep holes all over the cake, still in the pan (space holes about 1 inch apart).
4. Pour gelatin mixture over top of cake. Refrigerate cake overnight or while preparing topping.
5. Topping: In a chilled, deep bowl, blend whipped topping mix, instant pudding and milk until stiff (about 5-8 minutes). Frost cake immediately.
6. Store in refrigerator and serve chilled. Decorate with green-colored sprinkles.
Note: This recipe remains accurate to the original, with no added ingredients or steps. The instructions have been clarified for better understanding and consistency.
